violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Case of food stored on floor at indoor walk in freezer. -Case of food stored on floor in older outdoor walk in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Multiple items with make dates older than 10 days: Custard 1/5, Salsa (made in-house) 1/3, Vanilla butter 12/27, Pesto 12/20, Lemon Aoli 12/30, Pesto Aoli 12/31, P.O.W. Sauce 12/29, Cheesecake 1/5. *Items were removed for disposal during inspection.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Left fryer is not fully under hood.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris at the base of the commercial can opener. -Alto Sham has food splatter at interior of upper unit and door fronts. *COS-cleaned during in inspection. -Some crumb debris at interior of (syrup containers) storage bin. -Limescale/rust present at screws of interior panel of the ice machine.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Heavy grease/debris at ceiling/corner above fryer. -Frost/ice build up at ceiling, shelves, floor in older outdoor walk in freezer.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Ventilation cover missing at ceiling vent in bakery area.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Whipped vanilla butter left at room temperature for service found with temperature of 63F. *Removed for disposal. -Pepperoni in cookline make table stored above cold line of top rail found with temperature of 46F. *Moved to bottom of unit.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
